channel.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • KooZic - Music server with powerful playlist features and Subsonic compatibility. (Source Codestars86) LGPL-3.0/MIT Python

    • Software

    Software Development - IDE & Tools

  • Motor Admin - No-code admin panel and business intelligence software - search, create, update, and delete data entries, create custom actions, and build reports. (Source Codestars1.4k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Software

    Automation

  • SiteInspector - Web-based tool for catching spelling errors, grammatical errors, broken links, and other errors on websites. (Source Codestars200) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2022
item.description:
Software

URL Shorteners

  • Clink - Dead-simple, super minimal URL shortener in C. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 C

    • Software

    Software Development - Project Management

  • Cgit - A fast lightweight web interface for git repositories. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 C

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Video Streaming

  • SRS - A simple, high efficiency and real-time video server, supports RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, HTTP-FLV and SRT. (Source Codestars19.3k) MIT Docker/C++

    • Software

    Archiving and Digital Preservation (DP)

  • Waybackstars333 - A self-hosted toolkit for archiving webpages to the Internet Archive, archive.today, IPFS, and local file systems. GPL-3.0 Go

    • Software

    Knowledge Management Tools

  • Atomic Serverstars123 - Knowledge graph database with documents (similar to Notion), tables, search, and a powerful linked data API. Lightweight, very fast and no runtime dependencies. (Demo) MIT Docker/Rust

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Software

Communication - Social Networks and Forums

  • qpixel - Q&A-based community knowledge-sharing software. (Source Codestars205) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • kbin - Federated content aggregator and microblogging platform. (Source Codestars52) AGPL-3.0 PHP/Nodejs/Docker

    • Software

    Software Development - Project Management

  • Gerrit - A code review and project management tool for Git based projects. (Source Codestars679) Apache-2.0 Java/Docker

    • Software

    Recipe Management

  • KitchenOwl - A cross-platform shopping list, recipe storage, expense tracker, and meal planner following the material design language. (Source Codestars174) AGPL-3.0 Docker

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • Chitchatter - A peer-to-peer chat app that is serverless, decentralized, and ephemeral. (Source Codestars330) GPL-2.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • Malojastars477 - Self-hosted music scrobble database, alternative to Last.fm. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Python/Docker

    • Software

    Automation

  • tubesyncstars803 ⚠ - Syncs YouTube channels and playlists to a locally hosted media server. AGPL-3.0 Docker/Python

    • Software

    Software Development - API Management

  • Svix - Open-source webhooks as a service that makes it super easy for API providers to send webhooks. (Source Codestars747) MIT Docker/Rust

    • Software

    Self-hosting Solutions

  • Marauderstars172 ⚠ - Marauder is a fully dockerized cloud media server solution utilising Google Drive as an unlimited disk backend, assisting with the setup of tools like Sonarr, Radarr, Sabnzbd, Transmission and services enhancing their function. MIT Docker

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Ticketing

  • Iguanastars41 - Iguana is an open source issue management system with a kanban board. CC-BY-SA-4.0 Python/Docker

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Mail Delivery Agents

  • Stalwart JMAP - JMAP and IMAP server designed to be secure, fast, robust and scalable. (Source Codestars360) AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • Software

    Blogging Platforms

  • FlatPress - A lightweight, easy-to-set-up flat-file blogging engine. (Source Codestars140) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Payload CMS - Developer-first headless CMS and application framework. (Demo, Source Codestars7.7k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Polls and Events

  • Claper - The ultimate tool to interact with your audience. An open-source alternative to Slido, AhaSlides and Mentimeter. (Source Codestars142) GPL-3.0 Elixir/Docker
  • Fider - Open source alternative to UserVoice for customer feedback. (Demo, Source Codestars2.1k) MIT Go
  • Framadate - Online service for planning an appointment or make a decision quickly and easily: Make a poll, Define dates or subjects to choose, Send the poll link to your friends or colleagues, Discuss and make a decision. (Demo, Source Code) CECILL-B PHP
  • Meetable - A minimal events aggregator. (Source Codestars65) MIT PHP
  • Christmas Communitystars59 - Create a simple place for your entire family to use to find gifts that people want, and to avoid double-gifting. AGPL-3.0 Docker/Nodejs

    • Software

    Bookmarks and Link Sharing

  • Briefkastenstars149 - Modern app for saving and managing your own bookmarks. Includes a browser extension. (Demo) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    File Transfer - Web-based File Managers

  • ResourceSpace - ResourceSpace open source digital asset management software is the simple, fast, and free way to organise your digital assets. (Demo, Source Code) BSD-4-Clause PHP

    • Software

    Games

  • Posiostars488 - Geography multiplayer game. MIT Python
  • Hextrisstars2k - Fast paced HTML5 puzzle game inspired by Tetris. GPL-3.0 HTML5
  • MTA:SA ⚠ - Multi Theft Auto (MTA) is a software project that adds network play functionality to Rockstar North's Grand Theft Auto game series, in which this functionality is not originally found. (Source Codestars1k) GPL-3.0 C++

    • Software

    Self-hosting Solutions

  • Bitsii Bridge ⚠ - Easy to install self-hosting platform for Windows, MacOS, and Linux. Depends on a dynamic DNS provider and Let's Encrypt. (Source Code) MPL-2.0 Java/Other
  • MeshCentral - A full computer management website. With MeshCentral, you can run your own web server to remotely manage and control computers on a local network or anywhere on the internet. (Source Codestars1.8k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Wikis

  • Raneto - Raneto is an open source Knowledgebase platform that uses static Markdown files to power your Knowledgebase. (Source Codestars2.5k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Search Engines

  • MeiliSearch - Ultra relevant, instant and typo-tolerant full-text search API. (Source Codestars30.1k) MIT Rust

    • Software

    Recipe Management

  • Recepturer ⚠ - Let Recepturer help you organize all your recipes in one place. You can add, edit and delete recipes, and create meal plans. Simply type your recipe and all ingredients will be listed as you go. Data is stored on Dropbox. (Source Codestars0) MIT Javascript

    • Software

    Proxy

  • Pomerium - An identity-aware reverse proxy, successor to now obsolete oauth_proxy. It inserts an OAuth step before proxying your request to the backend, so that you can safely expose your self-hosted websites to public Internet. (Source Codestars3.3k) Apache-2.0 Go

    • Software

    Note-taking & Editors

  • Standard Notes - Simple and private notes app. Protect your privacy while getting more done. That's Standard Notes. (Demo, Source Codestars3.8k) GPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Software

    Genealogy

  • Genea.app - Genea is a privacy by design and open source tool anyone can use to author or edit their family tree. Data is stored in the GEDCOM format and all processing is done in the browser. (Source Codestars75) MIT Javascript

    • Software

    Miscellaneous

  • Bytebase - Safe database schema change and version control for DevOps teams, supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, TiDB, ClickHouse, and Snowflake. (Demo, Source Codestars4k) MIT Docker/Go

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • Volumio - A free and open source linux distribution, designed and fine-tuned exclusively for music playback. (Source Codestars1.3k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Learning and Courses

  • Gibbon - The flexible, open source school management platform designed to make life better for teachers, students, parents and leaders. (Source Codestars345) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Groupware

  • SOGo - SOGo offers multiple ways to access the calendaring and messaging data. CalDAV, CardDAV, GroupDAV, as well as ActiveSync, including native Outlook compatibility and Web interface. (Demo, Source Codestars1.4k) LGPL-2.1 Objective-C
  • Kopano - Groupware suite including e-mail, calendars, tasks, todos and notes. Featuring a modern WebApp, DeskApp and mobile access over Z-Push/ActiveSync. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 C/Python/PHP

    • Software

    File Transfer & Synchronization

  • Z-Push - Implementation of Microsoft’s ActiveSync protocol. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • OpenSSH SFTP server - Secure File Transfer Program. (Source Code) BSD-2-Clause C

    • Software

    E-commerce

  • Shopware Community Edition - PHP based open source e-commerce software made in Germany. (Demo, Source Codestars2k) MIT PHP

    • Software

    Maps and Global Positioning System (GPS)

  • Headwaystars2.3k - Self-hostable web maps stack, powered by OpenStreetMap. Easy to set up for cities and small regions and supports full-planet maps. (Demo) Apache-2.0 Docker

    • Software

    Communication - SIP

  • Flexisip - A complete, modular and scalable SIP server, includes a push gateway, to deliver SIP incoming calls or text messages on mobile device platforms where push notifications are required to receive information when the app is not active in the foreground. (Source Codestars103) AGPL-3.0 C/Docker

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Self-hosting Solutions

  • VivumLab - An open-source data-center, owned by you, the user. VivumLab deploys web services to a server. (Source Codestars32) MIT Docker/Shell
  • CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Home Cloud system. (Source Codestars6.8k) Apache-2.0 Go/Docker

    • Software

    E-commerce

  • MedusaJs - Medusa is an open-source headless commerce engine that enables developers to create amazing digital commerce experiences. (Demo, Source Codestars14.4k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Recipe Management

  • reciphpes!stars5 - A lightweight, Symfony-based recipes indexing software supporting search and tags, using a SQLite database. MIT Docker

    • Software

    Pastebins

  • SnyPy - Open source on-prem code snippet manager. (Demo, Source Code) MIT Docker

    • Software

    Bookmarks and Link Sharing

  • NeonLinkstars10 - Self-hosted bookmark service with unique design and simple installation with Docker. MIT Docker

    • Software

    Internet of Things (IoT)

  • EMQX - An ultra-scalable open-source MQTT broker. Connect 100M+ IoT devices in one single cluster, move and process real-time IoT data with 1M msg/s throughput at 1ms latency. (Demo, Source Codestars10.5k) Apache-2.0 Docker

    • Software

    URL Shorteners

  • Short{Paste}stars13 - A Go based URL shortener, pastebin and file uploader. MIT Docker

    • Software

    Task Management & To-do Lists

  • Our Shopping Liststars15 - Simple shared list application. Typical uses include shopping lists of course, and any other small todo-list that needs to be used collaboratively. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 Docker

    • Software

    Software Development - FaaS & Serverless

  • Nhost - The Open Source Firebase Alternative with GraphQL. Get a database and backend configured and ready in minutes. (Source Codestars4.5k) MIT Docker/Nodejs/Go

    • Software

    Communication - Video Conferencing

  • MiroTalk P2P - Simple, secure, fast real-time video conferences up to 4k and 60fps, compatible with all browsers and platforms. (Demo, Source Codestars1.3k) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs/Docker
  • MiroTalk SFU - Simple, secure, scalable real-time video conferences up to 4k, compatible with all browsers and platforms. (Demo, Source Codestars1k) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs/Docker

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Communication - Social Networks and Forums

  • Zusamstars101 - Free and open-source way to self-host private forums for groups of friends or family. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Document Management - Institutional Repository and Digital Library Software

  • Fedora Commons Repository - Robust and modular repository system for the management and dissemination of digital content especially suited for digital libraries and archives, both for access and preservation. (Source Codestars165) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Islandora - Drupal module for browsing and managing Fedora-based digital repositories. (Demo, Source Codestars138) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    File Transfer & Synchronization

  • Nextcloud - Access and share your files, calendars, contacts, mail and more from any device, on your terms. (Demo, Source Codestars20.3k) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    File Transfer - Object Storage & File Servers

  • Minio - Minio is an open source object storage server compatible with Amazon S3 APIs. (Source Codestars35.7k) AGPL-3.0 Go

    • Software

    File Transfer - Single-click & Drag-n-drop Upload

  • Chibisafe - Blazing fast file uploader and awesome bunker written in node. (Source Codestars1k) MIT Nodejs
  • Jirafeau - Jirafeau is a web site permitting to upload a file in a simple way and give an unique link to it. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Games

  • SourceBans++ - Admin, ban, and communication management system for games running on the Source engine. (Source Codestars262) CC-BY-SA-4.0 PHP

    • Software

    Groupware

  • Cozy Cloud - Personal cloud where you can manage and sync your contact, files and calendars, and manage your budget with an app store full of community contributions. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Learning and Courses

  • Canvas LMS - Canvas is the trusted, open-source learning management system (LMS) that is revolutionizing the way we educate. (Demo, Source Codestars4.5k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Software

    URL Shorteners

  • liteshort - User-friendly, actually lightweight, and configurable URL shortener. MIT Python

    • Software

    Wikis

  • Tiki - Wiki CMS Groupware with the most built-in features. (Demo, Source Code) LGPL-2.1 PHP

    • Software

    Self-hosting Solutions

  • Tipistars4.1k - Homeserver manager. One command setup, one click installs for your favorites self-hosted apps. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Shell

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Status / Uptime pages

  • Vigil - Microservices Status Page. Monitors a distributed infrastructure and sends alerts (Slack, SMS, etc.). (Demo, Source Codestars1.3k) MPL-2.0 Rust/Docker

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • Navidrome Music Server - Modern Music Server and Streamer, compatible with Subsonic/Airsonic. (Demo, Source Codestars4.9k, Clients) GPL-3.0 Docker/Go

    • Software

    Communication - Video Conferencing

  • Jitsi Meet - Jitsi Meet is an OpenSource (MIT) WebRTC Javascript application that uses Jitsi Videobridge to provide high quality, scalable video conferences. (Source Codestars18.7k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs/Docker

    • Software

    Human Resources Management (HRM)

  • OrangeHRM - OrangeHRM is a comprehensive HRM system that captures all the essential functionalities required for any enterprise. (Demo, Source Codestars424) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    Calendar & Contacts - CalDAV or CardDAV Web-based Clients

  • Bloben - CalDAV web client. (Demo, Source Codestars110) AGPL-3.0 Docker

    • Software

    Resource Planning

  • farmOS - Web-based farm record keeping application. (Demo, Source Codestars546) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Tania - Tania is a free and open source farming management system for everyone. You can manage your areas, reservoirs, farm tasks, inventories, and the crop growing progress. (Source Codestars585) Apache-2.0 Go

    • Software

    Internet of Things (IoT)

  • ioBroker - Integration platform for the Internet of Things, focused on building automation, smart metering, ambient assisted living, process automation, visualization and data logging. (Source Codestars1k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Search Engines

  • Fess - Fess is a very powerful and easily deployable Enterprise Search Server. (Demo, Source Codestars668) Apache-2.0 Java/Docker

    • Software

    Archiving and Digital Preservation (DP)

  • Ganymedestars56 ⚠ - Twitch VOD and Live Stream archiving platform. Includes a rendered chat for each archive. GPL-3.0 Docker

    • Software

    Pastebins

  • Hasty Paste - A place to quickly paste some text and share it. Mostly used for sharing debug logs and such to help developers provide tech support. The project aims to be both fast and minimal. (Source Codestars70) AGPL-3.0 Docker/Python

    • Software

    Miscellaneous

  • WeTTY - Terminal in browser over http/https. (Source Codestars3.4k) MIT Docker/Nodejs
  • Overseerr ⚠ - Overseerr is a free and open source software application for managing requests for your media library. It integrates with your existing services, such as Sonarr, Radarr, and Plex!. (Source Codestars1.8k) MIT Docker

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • LeapChat - Ephemeral, encrypted, in-browser chat rooms. (Source Codestars150) AGPL-3.0 Docker/Nodejs/Shell

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2022
item.description:
Software

Software Development - Low Code

  • ToolJet - ToolJet is the open-source low-code framework alternative to Retool & Mendix to build & deploy internal tools with minimal engineering effort. (Source Codestars14k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • Budibase - Build and automate internal tools, admin panels, dashboards, CRUD apps, and more, in minutes. Budibase is the open source alternative to Outsystems, Retool, Mendix, Appian. (Source Codestars15.4k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • Appsmith - Cloud or self-hosted open-source platform to build admin panels, CRUD apps and workflows. Build everything you need, 10x faster. (Source Codestars21.6k) Apache-2.0 Java/Docker

    • Software

    Communication - Social Networks and Forums

  • Isso - Lightweight commenting server written in Python and Javascript. It aims to be a drop-in replacement for Disqus. (Source Codestars4.7k) MIT Python/Docker
  • Enigma 1/2 BBS - Enigma 1/2 is a modern, multi-platform BBS engine with unlimited "callers" and legacy DOS door game support. (Demo, Source Codestars389) BSD-2-Clause Shell/Docker/Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - SIP

  • Routr - A lightweight sip proxy, location server, and registrar for a reliable and scalable SIP infrastructure. (Source Codestars965) MIT Docker

    • Software

    Communication - IRC

  • Glowing Bearstars890 - A web frontend for WeeChat. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Mail Transfer Agents

  • Haraka - High-performance, pluginable SMTP server written in Javascript. (Source Codestars4.2k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • Element - Fully-featured Matrix client for Web, iOS & Android. (Source Codestars8.9k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Archiving and Digital Preservation (DP)

  • Archivematica - Mature digital preservation system designed to maintain standards-based, long-term access to collections of digital objects. (Demo, Source Codestars329) AGPL-3.0-only Python
  • ArchivesSpace - Archives information management application for managing and providing Web access to archives, manuscripts and digital objects. (Demo, Source Codestars264) ECL-2.0 Ruby
  • Omeka S - Omeka S is a web publication system for universities, galleries, libraries, archives, and museums. It consists of a local network of independently curated exhibits sharing a collaboratively built pool of items, media, and their metadata. (Source Codestars304) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Remote Access

  • Firezone - Self-hosted secure remote access gateway that supports the WireGuard protocol. It offers a Web GUI, 1-line install script, multi-factor auth (MFA), and SSO. (Source Codestars2.9k) Apache-2.0 Elixir
  • Guacamole - Guacamole is a clientless remote desktop gateway. It supports standard protocols like VNC and RDP. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java/C
  • ShellHub - ShellHub is a modern SSH server for remotely accessing linux devices via command line (using any SSH client) or web-based user interface, designed as an alternative to sshd. (Source Codestars969) Apache-2.0 Go/Other
  • Sshwiftystars1.2k - Sshwifty is a SSH and Telnet connector made for the Web. AGPL-3.0 Go/Docker
  • Warpgatestars1.7k - Smart SSH and HTTPS bastion that works with any SSH client. Apache-2.0 Rust/Docker

    • External Links

  • Communities/forums: /r/selfhosted, IndieWeb

    • Software

    Calendar & Contacts - CalDAV or CardDAV Servers

  • calypso - Python-based CalDAV and CardDAV server, forked from Radicale. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Bookmarks and Link Sharing

  • linkdingstars2.4k - Minimal bookmark management with a fast and clean UI. Simple installation through Docker and can run on your Raspberry Pi. (Demo) MIT Docker/Python/Nodejs
  • LinkAce - A bookmark archive with automatic backups to the Internet Archive, link monitoring, and a full REST API. Installation is done via Docker, or as a simple PHP application. (Demo, Source Codestars1.6k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Hackersharestars381 - Social bookmarks website for hackers. (Demo) MIT Ruby
  • Bukustars5.3k - A powerful bookmark manager and a personal textual mini-web. GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Automation

  • feed2toot - Feed2toot parses a RSS feed, extracts the last entries and sends them to Mastodon. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Accelerated Text - Automatically generate multiple natural language descriptions of your data varying in wording and structure. (Source Codestars625) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Tube Archivist ⚠ - Your self hosted YouTube media server: Subscribe, download, index, search and play your favorite videos. (Source Codestars1.7k) GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Miscellaneous

  • TeslaMatestars3.2k - A powerful data logger for Tesla vehicles. MIT Elixir
  • tmate - Instant terminal sharing. (Source Codestars4.9k) ISC C
  • Teleport - Certificate authority and access plane for SSH, Kubernetes, web applications, and databases. (Source Codestars12.8k) Apache-2.0 Go
  • Neko - A self hosted virtual browser (rabb.it clone) that runs in Docker. (Source Codestars2.3k) Apache-2.0 Docker/Go
  • asciinemastars2k - Web app for hosting asciicasts. (Demo) Apache-2.0 Elixir/Docker
  • OS.js - Desktop implementation for your browser with a fully-fledged window manager, Application APIs, GUI toolkits and filesystem abstraction. (Demo, Source Codestars6.1k) BSD-2-Clause Nodejs
  • DOMJudge - A system for running a programming contest, like the ICPC regional and world championship programming contests. (Demo, Source Codestars582) GPL-2.0/BSD-3-Clause/MIT PHP

    • Software

    E-commerce

  • Attendize - Ticket selling and event management platform. (Source Codestars3.5k) AAL Docker/PHP

    • Software

    Software Development - Project Management

  • Taiga - Agile Project Management Tool based on the Kanban and Scrum methods. (Source Code) MPL-2.0 Docker/Python/Nodejs
  • Traq - Project management and issue tracking system written in PHP. (Source Codestars161) GPL-3.0 PHP/Nodejs

    • Software

    File Transfer - Peer-to-peer Filesharing

  • Dat Project - Powerful decentralized file sharing applications built from a large ecosystem of modules. (Source Code) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Complete Solutions

  • mkhoststars20 - Declarative, idempotent mail server configuration script. Apache-2.0 Python

    • Software

    Self-hosting Solutions

  • Discord Bot Dashboardstars201 ⚠ - A self-hosted platform to manage Discord bots and Node.js applications. MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • Databagstars7 - Federated messaging client for the web, supporting text, photos and video. (Demo) Apache-2.0 Docker

    • Software

    Search Engines

  • Manticore Searchstars2.2k - Much faster alternative to Elasticsearch for full-text search and data analytics. Provides much lower response time for small, medium and big data. GPL-2.0 Docker/C++

    • Software

    Task Management & To-do Lists

  • Minimalist Online Markdown Editor - The simplest and slickest online Markdown editor. (Source Codestars230) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Status / Uptime pages

  • StatPing.ng - An easy to use Status Page for your websites and applications. Statping will automatically fetch the application and render a beautiful status page with tons of features for you to build an even better status page. (Source Codestars457) GPL-3.0 Docker/Go

    • Software

    Communication - SIP

  • openSIPS - OpenSIPS is an Open Source SIP proxy/server for voice, video, IM, presence and any other SIP extensions. (Source Codestars1k) GPL-2.0 C

    • Software

    Photo and Video Galleries

  • This week in paststars3 - Aggregates images taken this week, from previous years and presents them on a web page with a simple slideshow. (Demo) MIT Docker/Rust
  • Thumbor - A smart imaging service and enables on-demand cropping, resizing, applying filters and optimizing images. (Source Codestars9.2k) MIT Python/Docker

    • Software

    Ticketing

  • Peppermint - A simple ticket management tool with support for logs and multi-deployment. (Source Codestars436) AGPL-3.0 Docker

    • Software

    Feed Readers

  • Yarrstars1.4k - Yarr (yet another rss reader) is a web-based feed aggregator which can be used both as a desktop application and a personal self-hosted server. MIT Go

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Miscellaneous

  • NATS - Publish/Subscribe event bus, durable queues, key-value store, object store, and more. Native multi-tenancy, multiple authentication and authorization mechanisms. Easy to self-host and federate. (Source Codestars11.7k, Clients) Apache-2.0 Go
  • Apache Solr - Solr is the popular, blazing-fast, open source enterprise search platform built on Apache Lucene. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Libre Translate - Free and Open Source Machine Translation API, entirely self-hosted. (Source Codestars2.9k) AGPL-3.0 Docker/Python
  • Wallabag - Wallabag, formerly Poche, is a web application allowing you to save articles to read them later with improved readability. (Source Codestars7.5k) MIT PHP
  • Readflow - Lightweight news reader with modern interface and features: full-text search, automatic categorization, archiving, offline support, notifications... (Source Codestars261) MIT Go

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • Audiobookshelf - Fully open-source self-hosted audiobook and podcast server. It streams all audio formats, keeps and syncs progress across devices. Comes with open-source apps for Android and iOS. (Source Codestars1.7k, Clientsstars1.7k) GPL-3.0 Docker/Nodejs

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • Novu - Self-hosted / cloud notification infrastructure for developers. (Source Codestars10.7k) MIT Docker/Nodejs
  • WBOstars1.5k - Web Whiteboard to collaborate in real-time on schemas, drawings, and notes. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs/Docker
  • Revolt - Revolt is a user-first chat platform built with modern web technologies. (Source Codestars1.4k) AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • Software

    Communication - Video Conferencing

  • Galene - Galène (or Galene) is a videoconference server (an “SFU”) that is easy to deploy and that requires moderate server resources. (Source Codestars693) MIT Go
  • plugNmeet - Scalable, High Performance, Open source web conferencing system. (Demo, Source Codestars47) MIT Docker/Go

    • Software

  • FLAP - Low maintenance framework to manage self-hosted services. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Docker/Shell
  • FreedomBox - Community project to develop, design and promote personal servers running free software for private, personal, communications. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python/Other
  • HomelabOS - Your very own offline-first privacy-centric open-source data-center. Deploy over 100 services with a few commands. (Source Code) MIT Docker
  • OpenMediaVault - OpenMediaVault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. It contains services like SSH, (S)FTP, SMB/CIFS, DAAP media server, RSync, BitTorrent client and many more. (Source Codestars3.3k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Sandstorm - Personal server for running self-hosted apps easily and securely. (Demo, Source Codestars6.1k) Apache-2.0 C++/Other
  • sovereignstars10.3k - Set of Ansible playbooks to build and maintain your own private cloud: email, calendar, contacts, file sync, IRC bouncer, VPN, and more. GPL-3.0 YAML/Other
  • Syncloud - Your own online file storage, social network or email server. (Source Codestars332) GPL-3.0 Python/Other
  • UBOS - Linux distro that runs on indie boxes (personal servers and IoT devices). Single-command installation and management of apps - Jenkins, Mediawiki, Owncloud, WordPress, etc., and other features. GPL-3.0 Perl/Other
  • xsrv - Install and manage self-hosted services/applications, on your own server(s). (Source Codestars176) GPL-3.0 Shell/Ansible
  • YunoHost - Server operating system aiming to make self-hosting accessible to everyone. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python/Other

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Sep 6th - Sep 12th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Booking and Scheduling

  • Alf.io - The open source ticket reservation system. (Demo, Source Codestars1k) GPL-3.0 Java
  • Easy!Appointments - A highly customizable web application that allows your customers to book appointments with you via the web. (Demo, Source Codestars2.4k) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Multimedia Streaming

  • Gerbera - Gerbera is an UPnP Media Server. It allows you to stream your digital media throughout your home network and listen to/watch it on a variety of UPnP compatible devices. (Source Codestars969) GPL-2.0 C++
  • homehoststars860 ⚠ - Self-hosted React + Redux app that streams your media collection (music, movies, books, podcasts, comics etc). MIT Nodejs
  • Jellyfin - Media server for audio, video, books, comics, and photos with a sleek interface and robust transcoding capabilities. Almost all modern platforms have clients, including Roku, Android TV, iOS, and Kodi. (Demo, Source Codestars16.9k) GPL-2.0 C#
  • LBRY - Is a secure, open, and community-run digital marketplace that aims to replace Youtube and Amazon. (Demo, Source Codestars249, Clientsstars3.6k) MIT PHP
  • MistServer - Streaming media server that works well in any streaming environment. (Source Codestars261) AGPL-3.0 C++
  • NymphCast - NymphCast is a Chromecast alternative which turns your choice of Linux-capable hardware into an audio and video source for a television or powered speakers. (Source Codestars2.2k) BSD-3-Clause C++
  • Podify - Allows you to download videos and audio from any source supported by youtube-dl and subscribe to and watch these downloads using your favorite podcast app. (Source Codestars205) GPL-3.0 Ruby
  • ReadyMedia - Simple media server software, with the aim of being fully compliant with DLNA/UPnP-AV clients. Formerly known as MiniDLNA. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 C
  • Rygel - Rygel is a UPnP AV MediaServer that allows you to easily share audio, video, and pictures. Media player software may use Rygel to become a MediaRenderer that may be controlled remotely by a UPnP or DLNA Controller. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C

    • Software

    Software Development - API Management

  • DreamFactory - Turns any SQL/NoSQL/Structured data into Restful API. (Source Codestars1.3k) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • form.io - A REST API building platform that utilizes a drag & drop form builder, and is application framework agnostic. Contains open source and enterprise version. (Demo, Source Code) MIT Nodejs
  • Fusio - Open-source API management platform which helps to build and manage REST APIs. (Demo, Source Codestars1.2k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Haptticstars181 - Simple HTTP server that forwards all requests to a shell script to handle webhooks you receive. Apache-2.0 Go
  • Hasura - Fast, instant realtime GraphQL APIs on Postgres with fine grained access control, also trigger webhooks on database events. (Source Codestars28.2k) Apache-2.0 Haskell
  • Hoppscotch - A free, fast and beautiful API request builder. (Source Codestars47.5k) MIT Nodejs/Vue/Nuxt
  • Kong - The World’s Most Popular Open Source Microservice API Gateway and Platform. (Source Codestars33.1k) Apache-2.0 Lua
  • Lura - Open source High-Performance API Gateway. (Source Codestars5.3k) Apache-2.0 Go
  • Para - Flexible and modular backend framework/server for object persistence, API development and authentication. (Source Codestars454) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Pizzlystars1.1k - Open-source API Integrations Manager that provides everything a developer needs to interact with OAuth based APIs. MIT Nodejs
  • Tyk - Fast and scalable open source API Gateway. Out of the box, Tyk offers an API Management Platform with an API Gateway, API Analytics, Developer Portal and API Management Dashboard. (Source Codestars7.8k) MPL-2.0 Go

    • Software

    Software Development - FaaS & Serverless

  • Appwrite - End to end backend server for web, native, and mobile developers 🚀. (Source Codestars26.3k) BSD-3-Clause PHP
  • IronFunctionsstars3.1k - The serverless microservices platform by iron.io. Apache-2.0 Go
  • LocalStack - LocalStack is a fully functional local AWS cloud stack. This includes Lambda for serverless computation. (Source Codestars44k) Apache-2.0 Python/Other
  • OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple for Docker & Kubernetes. (Source Codestars22.2k) MIT Go
  • Trusted-CGIstars140 - Lightweight self-hosted lambda/applications/cgi/serverless-functions platform. MIT Go

    • Software

    Software Development - IDE & Tools

  • Eclipse Che - Open source workspace server and cloud IDE. (Source Codestars6.7k) EPL-1.0 Docker/Java
  • JupyterLab - Web-based environment for interactive and reproducible computing. (Demo, Source Codestars12.4k) BSD-3-Clause Python/Docker

    • Software

    Software Development - Localization

  • Accent - Open-source, self-hosted, developer-oriented translation tool. (Source Codestars881) BSD-3-Clause Elixir
  • Localizer - Free self-hosted open-source crowd-translating service for your product. (Demo, Source Codestars34) MIT Nodejs/Docker
  • Pootle - Online translation and localization tool. (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Weblate - Web-based translation tool with tight version control integration. (Demo, Source Codestars3.2k) GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Communication - Social Networks and Forums

  • Bibliogram ⚠ - An alternative front-end for Instagram. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Blogging Platforms

  • Haven - Private blogging system with markdown editing and built in RSS reader. (Demo, Source Codestars459) MIT Ruby

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Complete Solutions

  • Mailu - Mailu is a simple yet full-featured mail server as a set of Docker images. (Source Codestars4k) MIT Docker/Python

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • StoneAge Messenger - A self-hosted Android messenger, S3-compatible storage is the only backend needed. (Source Code, Clients) GPL-3.0 Java

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Aug 30th - Sep 5th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Community-Supported Agriculture (CSA)

  • Cagette - Open source web app to help people build a better and sustainable food system. Some people call it a 'foodhub' - a mix between a groupware and a marketplace, helping consumers to order food from local farmers and producers. (Source Codestars122) GPL-2.0 Haxe
  • Open Food Network - Online marketplace for local food. It enables a network of independent online food stores that connect farmers and food hubs with individuals and local businesses. (Source Codestars880) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Software

    Proxy

  • SWAG (Secure Web Application Gateway)stars1.5k - Nginx webserver and reverse proxy with PHP support, built-in Certbot (Let's Encrypt) client and fail2ban integration. GPL-3.0 Docker
  • iodine - IPv4 over DNS tunnel solution, enabling you to start up a socks5 proxy listener. (Source Codestars4.5k) ISC C
  • Pound - Light-weight reverse proxy and load balancer for HTTP/HTTPS. GPL-2.0 C
  • Privoxy - Non-caching web proxy with advanced filtering capabilities for enhancing privacy, modifying web page data and HTTP headers, controlling access, and removing ads and other obnoxious Internet junk. GPL-2.0 C

    • Software

    Archiving and Digital Preservation (DP)

  • Collective Access - Providence - Highly configurable Web-based framework for management, description, and discovery of digital and physical collections supporting a variety of metadata standards, data types, and media formats. (Source Codestars234) GPL-3.0-only PHP

    • Software

    Automation

  • Alltube - Web interface for youtube-dlstars114.1k, a program to download videos and audio from more than 100 websites. (Source Codestars2.5k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • feedmixerstars100 - FeedMixer is a WSGI (Python3) micro web service which takes a list of feed URLs and returns a new feed consisting of the most recent n entries from each given feed(Returns Atom, RSS, or JSON). (Demo) WTFPL Python
  • homebank-converterstars36 - Web app to convert an export bank file to compatible Homebank csv. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 HTML5
  • SickRage - SickRage is an automatic Video Library Manager for TV Shows. Automatic torrent/nzb searching, downloading, and processing at the qualities you want. (Source Codestars1.5k) GPL-3.0 Python
  • WebUI-aria2stars8.9k - Interface to interact with the aria2 downloader. Very simple to use, just download and open index.html in any web browser. (Demo) MIT HTML5

    • Software

    Blogging Platforms

  • Chyrp Lite - Extra-awesome, extra-lightweight blog engine. (Source Codestars192) BSD-3-Clause PHP
  • PluXml - XML-based blog/CMS platform. (Source Codestars191) GPL-1.0 PHP

    • Software

    Calendar & Contacts - CalDAV or CardDAV Servers

  • Baïkal - Lightweight CalDAV and CardDAV server based on sabre/dav. (Source Codestars2k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Radicale - Simple calendar and contact server with extremely low administrative overhead. (Source Codestars2.6k) GPL-3.0 Python
  • SabreDAV - Open source CardDAV, CalDAV, and WebDAV framework and server. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT PHP

    • Software

    Communication - Custom Communication Systems

  • Live Helper Chat - Live Support chat for your website. (Source Codestars1.7k) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • Mattermost - Open-source, on-prem Slack-alternative. It can be integrated with Gitlab. (Source Codestars24.1k) AGPL-3.0/Apache-2.0 Go
  • Spectrum 2 - Spectrum 2 is an open source instant messaging transport. It allows users to chat together even when they are using different IM networks. (Source Codestars340) GPL-3.0 C++
  • Synapse - Server for Matrix, an open standard for decentralized persistent communication. (Source Codestars10k) Apache-2.0 Python

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Complete Solutions

  • iRedMail - Full-featured mail server solution based on Postfix and Dovecot. (Source Codestars878) GPL-3.0 Shell
  • Modoboa - Modoboa is a mail hosting and management platform including a modern and simplified Web User Interface. (Source Codestars2.3k) ISC Python

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Mail Transfer Agents

  • Courier MTA - Fast, scalable, enterprise mail/groupware server providing ESMTP, IMAP, POP3, webmail, mailing list, basic web-based calendaring and scheduling services. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • Exim - Message transfer agent (MTA) developed at the University of Cambridge. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • MailCatcher - Ruby gem that deploys a simply SMTP MTA gateway that accepts all mail and displays in web interface. Useful for debugging or development. (Source Codestars5.8k) MIT Ruby
  • OpenSMTPD - Secure SMTP server implementation from the OpenBSD project. (Source Code) ISC C
  • Sendmail - Message transfer agent (MTA). Sendmail C
  • Slimta - Mail Transfer Library built on Python. (Source Codestars162) MIT Python

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Mailing Lists and Newsletters

  • Dada Mail - Web-based list management system that can be used for announcement lists and/or discussion lists. (Source Codestars147) GPL-2.0 Perl

    • Software

    Communication - Email - Webmail Clients

  • Cypht - Feed reader for your email accounts. (Source Codestars757) LGPL-2.1 PHP
  • SquirrelMail - Another browser-based IMAP client. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    Communication - IRC

  • Convos - Always online web IRC client. (Demo, Source Codestars907) Artistic-2.0 Perl
  • ZNC - Advanced IRC bouncer. (Source Codestars1.9k) Apache-2.0 C++

    • Software

    Communication - SIP

  • Asterisk - Easy to use but advanced IP PBX system, VoIP gateway and conference server. GPL-2.0 C
  • Freepbx - Web-based open source GUI that controls and manages Asterisk. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Kamailio - Modular SIP server (registrar/proxy/router/etc). (Source Codestars1.7k) GPL-2.0 C
  • Kazoo - KAZOO is an open-source, highly scalable software platform designed to provide carrier-grade VoIP switch functions and features. (Source Codestars885) MPL-1.1 Erlang
  • SipXcom - Open source unified communications system. (Source Codestars33) AGPL-3.0 Java
  • Wazo - Full-featured IPBX solution built atop Asterisk with integrated Web administration interface and REST-ful API. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Communication - Social Networks and Forums

  • Bootcamp - Enterprise social network. (Source Codestars2.2k) MIT Python
  • Discourse - Advanced forum / community solution based on Ruby and JS. (Demo, Source Codestars36.6k) GPL-2.0 Ruby
  • Flarum - Delightfully simple forums. Flarum is the next-generation forum software that makes online discussion fun again. (Source Codestars13.4k) MIT PHP
  • MyBB - Free, extensible forum software package. (Source Codestars868) LGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Orange Forum - Orange Forum is an easy to deploy forum that has minimal dependencies and uses very little javascript. (Source Codestars417) BSD-3-Clause Go
  • PixelFed - Pixelfed is an open-source, federated platform alternate to Instagram. (Source Codestars3.9k) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Communication - XMPP - Servers

  • Openfire - Real time collaboration (RTC) server. (Source Codestars2.6k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Prosody IM - Feature-rich and easy to configure XMPP server. (Source Code) MIT Lua
  • Tigase - XMPP server implementation in Java. GPL-3.0 Java

    • Software

    Communication - XMPP - Web Clients

  • Libervia - Web frontend from Salut à Toi. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python
  • Salut à Toi - Multipurpose, multi frontend, libre and decentralized communication tool. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Conference Management

  • Conference Organizing Distribution (COD) - Create conference and event websites built on top of Drupal. (Source Code) GPL-1.0 PHP
  • osem - Event management tailored to free Software conferences. (Demo, Source Codestars744) MIT Ruby

    • Software

    Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • CMS Made Simple - Open source content management system, faster and easier management of website contents, scalable for small businesses to large corporations. (Source Code) GPL-1.0 PHP
  • Cockpit - Simple Content Platform to manage any structured content. (Source Codestars5.3k) MIT PHP
  • Concrete 5 CMS - Open source content management system. (Source Codestars707) MIT PHP
  • CouchCMS - Simple Open-Source CMS for designers. (Source Codestars311) CPAL-1.0 PHP
  • Drupal - Advanced open source content management platform. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • eLabFTW - Online lab notebook for research labs. Store experiments, use a database to find reagents or protocols, use trusted timestamping to legally timestamp an experiment, export as pdf or zip archive, share with collaborators…. (Demo, Source Codestars664) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • MODX - MODX is an advanced content management and publishing platform. The current version is called 'Revolution'. (Source Codestars1.3k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Omeka - Create complex narratives and share rich collections, adhering to Dublin Core standards with Omeka on your server, designed for scholars, museums, libraries, archives, and enthusiasts. (Demo, Source Codestars406) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Pico - Stupidly simple, blazing fast, flat file CMS. (Source Codestars3.6k) MIT PHP
  • PropertyWebBuilder - Ultimate Ruby on Rails engine for creating real estate websites. (Demo, Source Codestars457) MIT Ruby
  • SilverStripe - Easy to use CMS with powerful MVC framework underlying. (Demo, Source Code) BSD-3-Clause PHP
  • SPIP - Publication system for the Internet aimed at collaborative work, multilingual environments, and simplicity of use for web authors. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Squidex - Headless CMS, based on MongoDB, CQRS and Event Sourcing. (Demo, Source Codestars1.8k) MIT .NET
  • Textpattern - Flexible, elegant and easy-to-use CMS. (Demo, Source Codestars697) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • WonderCMS - WonderCMS is the smallest flat file CMS since 2008. (Demo, Source Codestars491) MIT PHP

    • Software

    DNS

  • SPF Toolbox - Application to look up DNS records such as SPF, MX, Whois, and more. (Source Codestars208) MIT PHP

    • Software

    Document Management

  • Mayan EDMS - Free Open Source Electronic Document Management System. An electronic vault for your documents with preview generation, OCR, and automatic categorization among other features. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Python

    • Software

    Document Management - E-books

  • BicBucStriim - Provides web-based access to your Calibre Library's e-book collection. (Source Codestars386) MIT PHP
  • Tanoshistars291 - Selfhosted web manga reader with extensions. MIT Rust

    • Software

    Document Management - Institutional Repository and Digital Library Software

  • DSpace - Turnkey repository application providing durable access to digital resources. (Source Codestars670) BSD-3-Clause Java
  • EPrints - Digital document management system with a flexible metadata and workflow model primarily aimed at academic institutions. (Demo, Source Codestars60) GPL-3.0 Perl

    • Software

    Feed Readers

  • FreshRSS - Self-hostable RSS feed aggregator. (Demo, Source Codestars4.8k, Clientsstars107) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Kriss Feed - Simple and smart (or stupid) feed reader. (Demo, Source Codestars268) CC0-1.0 PHP
  • NewsBlur - NewsBlur is a personal news reader that brings people together to talk about the world. A new sound of an old instrument. (Source Codestars6.1k) MIT Python
  • Selfoss - New multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application. (Source Codestars2.2k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Sismics Reader - Free and open source feeds reader, including all major Google Reader features. (Demo, Source Codestars374) GPL-2.0 Java

    • Software

    File Transfer - Single-click & Drag-n-drop Upload

  • ProjectSend - Upload files and assign them to specific clients you create. Give access to those files to your clients. (Source Codestars938) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    File Transfer - Web-based File Managers

  • DirectoryLister - Simple PHP based directory lister that lists a directory and all its sub-directories and allows you to navigate there within. (Source Codestars1.7k) MIT PHP

    • Software

    Games

  • A Dark Roomstars6k - Minimalist text adventure game for your browser. (Demo) MPL-2.0 HTML5

    • Software

    Groupware

  • egroupware - Software suite including calendars, address books, notepad, project management tools, client relationship management tools (CRM), knowledge management tools, a wiki and a CMS. (Source Codestars194) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • SuiteCRM - The award-winning, enterprise-class open source CRM. (Source Codestars3.1k) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Internet of Things (IoT)

  • Node RED - Browser-based flow editor that helps you wiring hardware devices, APIs and online services to create IoT solutions. (Source Codestars15.4k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs
  • openHAB - Vendor and technology agnostic open source software for home automation. (Source Codestars697) EPL-2.0 Java

    • Software

    Knowledge Management Tools

  • Mindmapsstars2.5k - Open source, offline capable, mind mapping application. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 HTML5

    • Software

    Learning and Courses

  • ILIAS - ILIAS is the Learning Management System that can cope with anything you throw at it. (Demo, Source Codestars308) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Open eClass - Open eClass is an advanced e-learning solution that can enhance the teaching and learning process. (Demo, Source Codestars106) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    Maps and Global Positioning System (GPS)

  • OwnTracks Recorderstars637 ⚠ - Store and access data published by OwnTracks location tracking apps. GPL-2.0 C/Lua
  • TileServer GL - Vector and raster maps with GL styles. Server side rendering by Mapbox GL Native. Map tile server for Mapbox GL JS, Android, iOS, Leaflet, OpenLayers, GIS via WMTS, etc. (Source Codestars1.6k) BSD-2-Clause Nodejs
  • TileServer PHP - Serve map tiles from any PHP hosting. (Source Codestars515) BSD-2-Clause PHP
  • Traccar - Java application to track GPS positions. Supports loads of tracking devices and protocols, has an Android and iOS App. Has a web interface to view your trips. (Demo, Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Audio Streaming

  • Ampache - Web based audio/video streaming application. (Demo, Source Codestars3.1k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Beets - Music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger (command-line and Web interface). (Source Codestars11.2k) MIT Python
  • GNU FM - Running music community websites, alternative to last.fm. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • LibreTime - Simple, open source platform that lets you broadcast streaming radio on the web (fork of Airtimestars606). (Source Codestars635) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Mopidy - Extensible music server. Offers a superset of the mpd API, as well as integration with 3rd party services like Spotify, SoundCloud etc. (Source Codestars7.5k) Apache-2.0 Python
  • mpd - Daemon to remotely play music, stream music, handle and organize playlists. Many clients available. (Source Codestars1.7k, Clients) GPL-2.0 C++
  • mStream - Music streaming server with GUI management tools. Runs on Mac, Windows, and Linux. (Source Codestars1.9k) GPL-2.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Media Streaming - Video Streaming

  • CyTubestars1.3k - CyTube is a web application providing media synchronization, chat, and more for an arbitrary number of channels. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • SyncTubestars151 - Lightweight and very simple to setup CyTube alternative to watch videos with friends and chat. (Demo) MIT Nodejs/Haxe

    • Software

    Miscellaneous

  • asciiflow - Flow Diagram Drawing Tool. (Source Codestars3.3k) MIT Nodejs
  • Reactive Resume - A one-of-a-kind resume builder that keeps your privacy in mind. Completely secure, customizable, portable, open-source and free forever. (Demo, Source Codestars7.8k) MIT Docker/Nodejs

    • Software

    Money, Budgeting & Management

  • Economizzer - An easy and secure system for you to manage your personal money and achieve your goals, and can be accessed by computer, tablet or smartphone. (Demostars405, Source Codestars405) MIT PHP
  • Galette - Galette is a membership management web application towards non profit organizations. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • GRR - Assets management and booking for small/medium companies. (Source Codestars60) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Hospital Run - Hospital Run is offline enabled hospital management software. (Demo, Source Codestars836) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Software

    Note-taking & Editors

  • dillinger - The last Markdown editor, ever. (Source Codestars7.5k) MIT Nodejs

    • Software

    Office Suites

  • Etherpad - Etherpad is a highly customizable Open Source online editor providing collaborative editing in really real-time. (Demo, Source Codestars13.4k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs
  • WebODF - Tools and libraries to view and edit Open Document Format (ODF) files. (Source Codestars766) AGPL-3.0 HTML5

    • Software

    Password Managers

  • sysPass - Multiuser password management system. (Demo, Source Codestars882) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Teampass - Password manager dedicated for managing passwords in a collaborative way. One symmetric key is used to encrypt all shared/team passwords and stored server side in a file and the database. works on any server Apache, MySQL and PHP. (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Pastebins

  • fichestars1.2k - Command line pastebin, all you need is netcat. (Demo) MIT C
  • mojopaste - Perl based pastebin. (Demo, Source Codestars38) Artistic-2.0 Perl

    • Software

    Personal Dashboards

  • wger - Web-based personal workout, fitness and weight logger/tracker. It can also be used as a simple gym management utility and offers a full REST API as well. (Demo, Source Codestars1.9k) AGPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Photo and Video Galleries

  • Coppermine - Multilingual photo gallery that integrates with various bulletin boards. Includes upload approval and password protected albums. (Demo, Source Codestars57) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Mediagoblin - Free software media publishing platform that anyone can run. You can think of it as a decentralized alternative to Flickr, YouTube, SoundCloud, etc. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python
  • UberGallery - UberGallery is an easy to use, simple to manage, web photo gallery. UberGallery does not require a database and supports JPEG, GIF and PNG file types. Simply upload your images and UberGallery will automatically generate thumbnails and output HTML. (Source Codestars204) MIT PHP
  • Zenphoto - Open-source gallery and CMS project. (Source Codestars267) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Software

    Polls and Events

  • Calagator - Event aggregator. (Source Codestars407) MIT Ruby
  • PHPBack - The open source feedback system. (Demo, Source Codestars370) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Software

    Resource Planning - Enterprise Resource Planning

  • Odoo - Free open source ERP system. (Demo, Source Codestars26.6k) LGPL-3.0 Python
  • Tryton - Free open source business solution. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python

    • Software

    Software Development - Project Management

  • Gitblit - Pure Java stack for managing, viewing, and serving Git repositories. (Source Codestars2.1k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • GitLab - Self Hosted Git repository management, code reviews, issue tracking, activity feeds and wikis. (Demo, Source Code) MIT Ruby
  • Gitlist - Web-based git repository browser - GitList allows you to browse repositories using your favorite browser, viewing files under different revisions, commit history and diffs. (Source Codestars2.9k) BSD-3-Clause PHP
  • Gitolite - Gitolite allows you to setup git hosting on a central server, with fine-grained access control and many more powerful features. (Source Codestars8.1k) GPL-2.0 Perl
  • Lavagna - Lavagna is an open-source issue/project management tool designed for small teams. Lightweight, pure Java, easy to install, easy to use. (Source Codestars597) GPL-3.0 Java
  • Redmine - Redmine is a flexible project management web application. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-2.0 Ruby
  • Trac - Trac is an enhanced wiki and issue tracking system for software development projects. BSD-3-Clause Python
  • ZenTao - An agile(scrum) project management system/tool. (Demo, Source Codestars914) ZPL-1.2 PHP

    • Software

    Software Development - Testing

  • Selenoid - Lightweight Selenium hub implementation launching browsers within Docker containers. (Source Codestars2.2k) Apache-2.0 Go

    • Software

    Task Management & To-do Lists

  • myTinyTodo - Simple way to manage your todo list in AJAX style. Uses PHP, jQuery, SQLite/MySQL. GTD compliant. (Demo, Source Codestars71) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • TaskBoard - Kanban-inspired app for keeping track of things that need to get done. (Demo, Source Codestars1.3k) MIT PHP
  • Tracks - Web-based application to help you implement David Allen’s Getting Things Done™ methodology. (Source Codestars1.1k) GPL-2.0 Ruby
